# Nimsith Yuthika

> Marketing Manager at Zenthos Productions (Sri Lanka game studio) and Founder of Gamer Network LK, a Sri Lankan gaming community. Transitioning into Cyber Security Engineering.

## Key facts
- Role: Marketing Manager, Zenthos Productions — drives brand, growth, and campaign strategy for the studio's debut title, Dark Vale (horror-detective thriller, ~85% complete).
- Founder: Gamer Network LK — a community connecting players, streamers, and creators across Sri Lanka.
- Education: Saranath National College, Kuliyapitiya (secondary); Esoft Metro Campus — UK OCN Level 3 IT Diploma, UK OCN Level 3 Management Diploma, Local English Diploma.
- Next goal: Cyber Security Engineering.
- Contact: nimsithyuthika391@gmail.com
